name: Development
description: Development is a Hyperion automatic shotgun with a quad-style layout. It burns multiple shells per trigger pull to deliver heavy close-range output and reliable pressure in sustained brawls. The trade-off is brutal ammo consumption, so it suits aggressive play but demands strong ammunition support to keep firing through longer encounters.
notes: Similar models show up in The Pre-Sequel, including the Crowd-Pleaser. In Borderlands 2 it appears at blue rarity or above from standard world drops. It shines with builds that scale damage during continuous, in-your-face fighting, but you may want ammo relics or regeneration to avoid running dry.
